retained_invariants_never_lifted.paper_only: PAPER ONLY forever. live_trading_enabled must stay false; no env may route real money.
retained_invariants_never_lifted.honest_accounting: No fake/inflated performance. Settle on real outcomes; report wins and losses truthfully.
retained_invariants_never_lifted.reconciliation: Ledger/decision-lifecycle reconciliation must stay true; fix reconciliation bugs, never fake them.

frozen_code_paths_note: ADVISORY ONLY: do not break open-snapshot persistence, paper ledger, or reconciliation.
